sections.sectionTitle: Ama Nasepna Thu-ah Paul A Kihutna

verses.text: Keimah Paul in Khrih migitna leh lungduaina tawh note kiangah ka hong thum hi. Kei pen note tawh ka hong omkhawm laitakin a meidawi, note tawh ka omkhawm loh ciangin a tapkual han'-in hong kigen hi

Note kiangah ka hong pai ciangin ka hong hangsankhak lohna dingin na omna dingun ka hong thum hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh leitung ngaihsutna tawh nasem hi, ci-in kote a hong ngaihsunte tungah hangtakin ka gamta ding hi
Kote pen leitungah a teng mi ka hi mah uh hi; ahi zongin leitung lungsim ngimna tawh galdo ka hi kei uh hi
Kote' zat galdona hiam pen leitung galhiam lelte hilo a, galte' pan'mun phualpi a susiazo ding Pasian' galhiam khauhte ahi hi
Mite' ngaihsutna a manlote ka thalnial gawpzo uh a, Pasian' thu theihna ding a khaktan thei nate ka susiagawp uh a, mi khempeuh' ngaihsutna zo gawpin Khrih' thu a mang dingin ka bawl uh hi
Note thumanin na cihtakna uh a kitheihtel khit ciangin a thumanlo a citaklo khempeuh gimpiak ding ka kipan ta ding uh hi

Note in na khatpeuh na ngaihsut uh ciangin a tungthamah a kimu theiteng na siksankha thei uh hi. Mi khatpeuh in Khrih tawh ka kipawl hi, ci-in a kingaihsut leh, amah a kipawl ahih zah mah bangin kote zong Khrih tawh a kipawl ka hihna thu uh limtakin ngaihsun ta hen
Bang hang hiam cih leh note' siatna ding hiloin note' hoihna dingin Topa in kote tungah hong piak thuneihna hong nakzat lua-in ka kisialhpih hangin themkhat zong ka maizum kei hi
Hih bangin lai ka hong gelhna tawh note a hong laugawpsak nuam ka hi kei hi
Mi pawlkhat in, “Paul' laigelhte khauhin nasia mahmah a, ahi zongin eite kiangah amah a om ciangin bangmah thupi khollo hi,” hong ci uh hi
Tua ahih manin lai ka hong gelhna sung uhah ka thugente uh leh note kiangah ka hong pai uh ciangin ka sepna dingte uh bangmah a kilamdang hetlo ding ahihna thu tua mite in teltakin thei ta uh hen
Kote ahih leh tua bangin a kiliansak mahmah mite tawh a kikimin ka kingaihsun ngam buang kei ding uh hi. Amaute khatlekhat ki-en kakin thupi kisa mahmah uh ahih manin mihai taktak ahi uh hi
Ahi zongin kote ka kisialhna ding uh kiciangtan a, note lakah na ka hong sepna dingun Pasian in a hong sehsaksa thu sung ciang bekah ka kisial thei uh hi
Note kiangah Khrih hangin lungdamna thu a hong hilh masate ka hih manun note kiangah thu ka hong hici gen uh ciangin a ciangtan khengvalin a gamta ka hi kei uh hi

Tua ahih manin Pasian in kote-a' dingin a hong sehsaksa khengvalin midangte' nasepna-ah a kisial ka hi kei uh a, Pasian' hong piak kote' huamsungah note' upna khangin note lakah ka nasepna uh a tangzaizaw a suahna ding a lamen ka hi uh hi
Tua hi leh note' gam banah gamdangah Lungdamna Thu ka hilh thei ding uh a, midangte' nasepnasa sungah zong ka kisialh ding uh kullo ding hi
Lai Siangtho in, “Mi khat peuhpeuh a kisialh nop leh Topa' nasepnate bek kisialhpih hen,” na ci hi
Bang hang hiam cih leh mi khat peuhpeuh amah a kiphattawm ciangin a kipakta hilo a, Topa in a phat ciangin a kipakta hi pan hi.
